title: Lavastone Biome
body:
# I lost the files :(

Credits to (me): [EchoesRealmArrow](https://www.bandlab.com/echoesrealmarrow) and [FozuJK_ReaperQL](https://www.bandlab.com/fozujk_small_music) for the music. Was created using MCreator. FozuJK has given me this original idea, made a music disk, and kind of helped me with the textures.

### This mod is a mod that adds some ~~cool~~ HOT items!

Look below for the features.

<details>
<summary>Lavastone Tools, Advancements, and Music Disks</summary>
When traversing the Nether, you will find some plants- but wait? There are no plants in the Nether (not including warts)! Well, in this mod, it adds them!

By mining the plants (careful, they sometimes act like a creeper when you mine them, they hate it!), you can craft the following:

1.  **Lavastone Sword** - A volatile blade! When hitting a mob, there is a **70% chance** the mob will violently explode with fire particles. However, there is a **30% chance** the energy backfires and **YOU** explode instead.
2.  **Lavastone Pickaxe** - Volcanic Smelting! When mining ores (Iron, Gold, Copper, etc.), there is a **70% chance** the block is instantly smelted into ingots. But be careful: there is a **30% chance** the pickaxe fails, causing an explosion that destroys the ore and damages you.
3.  **Lavastone Axe** - High risk, high reward. When chopping a log, you have a **50% chance** to superheat the tree, felling the whole thing instantly and turning it into charcoal. The other **50% of the time**, the axe explodes in your hand, setting you on fire.
4.  **Lavastone Shovel** - When digging soft blocks like dirt or sand, there is a **30% chance** the intense heat turns the block instantly into solid Stone.
5.  **Lavastone Hoe** - Instant Bakery! When harvesting crops, there is a **70% chance** the heat instantly cooks them (Potatoes become Baked Potatoes, Wheat becomes Bread, etc.). However, there is a **30% chance** the crop incinerates in a small explosion, destroying the harvest.

**New Advancements:**
Track your explosive journey with custom advancements for every tool! Can you unlock **"Luck of the Devil"**? This difficult challenge is awarded only to those unlucky enough to survive a backfire explosion from *every single* Lavastone tool.
</details>

**How to craft:**

1.  Find the Lavastone biome.
2.  Mine the plants.
3.  Craft them like shown below (or use the recipe book).

![A Minecraft recipe, with 3 lavastones across the top, and 2 sticks in the middle, making a lavastone pickaxe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5659602efb82fb788202b9a8e5fd0446af0efe16.png)

### The durability is WAY better than Netherite
